title: Re-peg governance ratchets for #142 manufacturing replay recovery
intent: Update two CI baseline files to reflect PR #142's manufacturing replay router recovery: router count +33 routes / +1 router file, and file-size thresholds for 2 restored files over the 500-line limit.

diff_articulation.what_changed: Two baseline files re-pegged for PR #142's recovery: (1) router_count_baseline.json route_decorators 1190->1223 and router_files 252->253 for the restored manufacturing_replay_router.py; (2) file_size_baseline.json adds manufacturing_replay_registry.py:771 and routers/cam/manufacturing_replay_router.py:612, inserted in alphabetical order. No fence_baseline.json change: the recovery added zero RunArtifact violations (Fence Checks passed on #142).
diff_articulation.why_not_redundant: PR #142 restored the manufacturing replay bundle (router + registry + companions), legitimately adding 33 distinct routes and two files over the 500-line threshold. These ratchets fire on that real growth; the re-peg accepts the verified-real surface so the gates enforce against the new, correct baseline.

commands_run: #142 Core CI router-count gate reported '1223 > 1190' and '253 > 252' (the exact deltas pegged here)

+33 routes confirmed REAL not duplication: 33 distinct method+path decorators in manufacturing_replay_router.py (4 resource families: observations/sessions/timelines/packages + meta/ci), 0 routes in the 3 companion files
file sizes verified on #142: manufacturing_replay_registry.py 771, routers/cam/manufacturing_replay_router.py 612 (file-size gate REGRESSION lines)
#142 Fence Checks (Blocking) passed -> no new RunArtifact violations -> no fence_baseline change needed
file_size_baseline.json sort invariant preserved: both new entries inserted in alphabetical position

files.intent: Accept +33 routes and +1 router file from PR #142 manufacturing_replay_router.py recovery
files.behavior_change: ci - re-pegs ratchet to the recovered route surface (1223 / 253)
verification: +33 confirmed distinct endpoints, not registration duplication; verified against #142 router-count gate output

files.intent: Accept 2 restored files over the 500-line threshold after PR #142
files.behavior_change: ci - whitelists manufacturing_replay_registry.py (771) and manufacturing_replay_router.py (612), inserted in sorted order
verification: Line counts verified via #142 file-size gate REGRESSION output; sort invariant preserved

files.intent: Declare CI-RED-023 ratchet re-peg scope for CBSP21 review
